tool_args.label: LaGuardia Airport Access Alternatives Analysis

payload.description: Study begun in May 2011 to develop faster and more reliable transit service to LaGuardia Airport. Identified Bus Rapid Transit (BRT) as the best-suited transit mode under the Select Bus Service (SBS) brand name.

tool_args.label: M60 SBS

payload.description: M60 SBS route serving LaGuardia Airport via 125th Street
Q33 route serving LaGuardia Airport, used by airport employees

payload.description: Proposed Queens SBS route to LaGuardia Airport, over 40% faster than current local service, with highway operation

tool_args.label: Manhattan/Bronx LGA SBS improvements

payload.description: Limited stops, dedicated bus lanes, transit signal priority, off-board fare payment, luggage racks

tool_args.label: Queens LGA SBS improvements

payload.description: Limited stops, highway operation, transit signal priority

tool_args.label: Study goals: improve transit access to LGA

payload.claim_text: Improve transit access to LGA, Improve transit service in neighborhoods near LGA, Provide transit improvements at a low cost and in a short timeframe
payload.description: Study goals for LaGuardia Airport Access Alternatives Analysis

payload.description: Benefit of proposed Manhattan/Bronx SBS improvements to LGA

tool_args.label: Most air passengers originate in Manhattan core

payload.claim_text: Most air passengers originate in the Manhattan core and currently travel by taxi or hired vehicle.
payload.description: Market research finding from 2005 FAA Survey about LGA air passenger travel patterns

tool_args.label: Leisure travel growing at LGA

payload.claim_text: Leisure travel is a growing market at LGA, and leisure travelers are more likely to ride transit.
payload.description: Market research finding about LGA passenger trends

tool_args.label: Airport employee commute patterns

payload.claim_text: Most airport employees who commute by transit live in Queens, Upper Manhattan, or the Bronx. Many employees ride transit, primarily the M60 and Q33. Shift times impact the ability to use transit.
payload.description: Airport employee commute patterns from 2011 Bus Rider Survey
